interaction_phrase: broad participation and co-creation are expected from a wide range of industries, including SMEs
occurrence_sentence: When manufacturing hardware systems like quantum computers, broad participation and co-creation are expected from a wide range of industries, including SMEs, spanning devices, components, materials, electronics, semiconductors, architecture/systems, refrigeration units, and manufacturing process equipment.

interaction_phrase: collaborate systematically
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, it is expected that organizations such as the General Incorporated Association for New Industry Creation through Quantum Technology (Q-STAR) and the Quantum Innovation Hub (QIH) will collaborate systematically.

interaction_phrase: leverages the results of basic research from universities
occurrence_sentence: The quantum industry often requires advanced technologies, leading to many cases where industrialization leverages the results of basic research from universities and research institutes.

interaction_phrase: Creating and revitalizing new industries/startups utilizing quantum technology
occurrence_sentence: Creating and revitalizing new industries/startups utilizing quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: are emerging
occurrence_sentence: In Japan too, startups and venture companies are emerging in both software and hardware sectors.

interaction_phrase: diverse user companies, vendor companies, universities, research institutions, etc., exchange information and opinions and engage in personnel exchanges
occurrence_sentence: When developing use cases, it is necessary to establish a framework for co-creation where diverse user companies, vendor companies, universities, research institutions, etc., exchange information and opinions and engage in personnel exchanges.

interaction_phrase: the government will actively use national projects as catalysts to encourage private investment
occurrence_sentence: As the quantum technology field requires long-term investment and technological development, the government will actively use national projects as catalysts to encourage private investment.

interaction_phrase: the government will foster the creation and nurturing of startups and other entities with a long-term perspective
occurrence_sentence: Through integrated support from industry, academia, and government, it will foster the creation and nurturing of startups and other entities with a long-term perspective.

interaction_phrase: the government will promote the creation and support of startups through matching with financial institutions and partner companies
occurrence_sentence: We will promote the creation and support of startups through matching with financial institutions and partner companies, cultivate young entrepreneurial talent to become key players, and establish mechanisms to generate business ideas utilizing quantum technology (e.g., pitch contests, ideathons/hackathons).

interaction_phrase: the government will form an innovation foundation that comprehensively supports startups and other entities
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, we will form an innovation foundation that comprehensively supports startups and other entities by fostering collaboration between existing companies and venture companies, collaboration among venture companies themselves, and ecosystem formation.

interaction_phrase: including universities, research institutions, and industry
occurrence_sentence: Industry and academia, including universities, research institutions, and industry, will work together to develop and provide educational programs for various fields, including industrial personnel and students.

interaction_phrase: public institutions like local governments
occurrence_sentence: In collaborative domains, it is also effective to comprehensively develop diverse use cases across various fields—such as town development addressing social issues—to advance cross-sectoral and cross-organizational initiatives. This approach can involve public institutions like local governments, potentially leading to future public procurement (e.g., municipal use).

interaction_phrase: many of these private companies are venture firms
occurrence_sentence: In recent years, private companies have become increasingly active in providing comprehensive usage support services, including consulting and education, alongside software services that offer applications, middleware, development environments, and other tools to assist users. In Japan, many of these private companies are venture firms.

interaction_phrase: Japan's first domestically developed prototype machine
occurrence_sentence: In March 2023, the National Institute for Basic Biology (hereinafter referred to as "RIKEN") announced and began operating Japan's first domestically developed prototype machine (a superconducting quantum computer testbed).

interaction_phrase: integrated efforts by industry, academia, and government
occurrence_sentence: The development of a domestically produced actual machine holds significant importance, contributing to the cultivation and advancement of elemental technologies from software to hardware, various related technologies for the entire system, and the design of hardware and architecture for quantum-classical hybrid technology development.

interaction_phrase: domestic vendors collaborating with RIKEN
occurrence_sentence: Subsequently, domestic vendors collaborating with RIKEN plan to make their own quantum computers publicly available in fiscal year 2023.

interaction_phrase: both institutions will cooperate and collaborate
occurrence_sentence: By clarifying such roles and working together, both institutions will cooperate and collaborate to support private sector activities.

interaction_phrase: build partnerships with private companies, including startups
occurrence_sentence: Japan will actively build partnerships with private companies, including startups, to promote their participation and activities, aiming for future practical application and industrialization.

interaction_phrase: to bolster the activities of these startups/ventures
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, to bolster the activities of these startups/ventures, we will enhance support mechanisms and build frameworks through national projects.

interaction_phrase: RIKEN will support research and development at the fundamental stage, while AIST will support industry
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, at the main hubs—RIKEN and AIST—RIKEN will support research and development at the fundamental stage, while AIST will support industry in the prototyping, testing, and evaluation processes for scaling up.

interaction_phrase: support the activities of such startups and venture companies
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, to support the activities of such startups and venture companies, we will enhance support through national projects and establish mechanisms.

interaction_phrase: Domestic companies are collaborating with AIST
occurrence_sentence: Domestic companies are collaborating with AIST to develop quantum annealing machines, with plans to unveil a prototype around fiscal year 2024 and aim for a 1,000-qubit-class machine by fiscal year 2027.

interaction_phrase: Canada's D-Wave Systems leads with commercial services
occurrence_sentence: Currently, Canada's D-Wave Systems leads with commercial services for machines around 5,000 qubits.

interaction_phrase: will jointly investigate and create a supply chain map
occurrence_sentence: The Quantum Technology-Based New Industry Creation Council (Q-STAR) (Japan), the Quantum Economic Development Consortium (Q E D - C ) ( U.S.), Quantum Industry Canada (QIC) (Canada), and the European Quantum Industry Consortium (QuIC) (Europe) will jointly investigate and create a supply chain map.

interaction_phrase: will jointly investigate and create a supply chain map
occurrence_sentence: The Quantum Technology-Based New Industry Creation Council (Q-STAR) (Japan), the Quantum Economic Development Consortium (Q E D - C ) ( U.S.), Quantum Industry Canada (QIC) (Canada), and the European Quantum Industry Consortium (QuIC) (Europe) will jointly investigate and create a supply chain map.

interaction_phrase: will jointly investigate and create a supply chain map
occurrence_sentence: The Quantum Technology-Based New Industry Creation Council (Q-STAR) (Japan), the Quantum Economic Development Consortium (Q E D - C ) ( U.S.), Quantum Industry Canada (QIC) (Canada), and the European Quantum Industry Consortium (QuIC) (Europe) will jointly investigate and create a supply chain map.

interaction_phrase: support public institutions, such as local governments, in promoting adoption as anchor tenants/early adopters
occurrence_sentence: We will also support public institutions, such as local governments, in promoting adoption as anchor tenants/early adopters.

interaction_phrase: encourage public institutions to serve as anchor tenants/early adopters
occurrence_sentence: To discover and expand user industries both domestically and internationally, we will promote the creation of compelling use cases and encourage public institutions to serve as anchor tenants/early adopters.

interaction_phrase: pursue overseas expansion through public-private collaboration
occurrence_sentence: To support domestic vendor businesses, we will provide technical development assistance through operations in wide-area testbeds, accumulate operational and usage (use case) track records, and pursue overseas expansion through public-private collaboration.

interaction_phrase: take the lead
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, key hubs such as the Quantum Technology Infrastructure Hub (tentative name), the Quantum Life Hub (National Institute for Quantum Science and Technology (QST),and the Quantum Sensor Hub (Tokyo Institute of Technology) will take the lead.

interaction_phrase: take the lead
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, key hubs such as the Quantum Technology Infrastructure Hub (tentative name), the Quantum Life Hub (National Institute for Quantum Science and Technology (QST),and the Quantum Sensor Hub (Tokyo Institute of Technology) will take the lead.

interaction_phrase: will take the lead in establishing and providing an open environment
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, major hubs such as the Quantum Technology Infrastructure Hub (tentative name) and the Quantum Life Hub (Quantum Research Organization) will take the lead in establishing and providing an open environment where numerous companies, including users and vendors, can easily utilize and develop quantum measurement and sensing technologies (particularly solid-state quantum sensors, hyperpolarization technology, optical lattice clock networks, etc., applicable to a wide range of industrial uses).

interaction_phrase: signed a memorandum of understanding
occurrence_sentence: The four quantum industry consortia—   (Q-STAR) (Japan), Quantum Economic Development Consortium (QED-C) (U.S.), Quantum Industry Canada (QIC) (Canada), and European Quantum Industry Consortium (QuIC) (Europe)—signed a memorandum of understanding to establish an international council aimed at promoting global quantum industry growth (February 1, 2023).

interaction_phrase: signed a memorandum of understanding
occurrence_sentence: The four quantum industry consortia—   (Q-STAR) (Japan), Quantum Economic Development Consortium (QED-C) (U.S.), Quantum Industry Canada (QIC) (Canada), and European Quantum Industry Consortium (QuIC) (Europe)—signed a memorandum of understanding to establish an international council aimed at promoting global quantum industry growth (February 1, 2023).

interaction_phrase: signed a memorandum of understanding
occurrence_sentence: The four quantum industry consortia—   (Q-STAR) (Japan), Quantum Economic Development Consortium (QED-C) (U.S.), Quantum Industry Canada (QIC) (Canada), and European Quantum Industry Consortium (QuIC) (Europe)—signed a memorandum of understanding to establish an international council aimed at promoting global quantum industry growth (February 1, 2023).

interaction_phrase: work together to create and support startups
occurrence_sentence: As the quantum technology market requires long-term investment, it is crucial for industry, academia, and government to work together to create and support startups and venture companies, enhancing various forms of support tailored to each stage and characteristic, with the goal of forming a future venture ecosystem.

interaction_phrase: work together to create and support startups
occurrence_sentence: As the quantum technology market requires long-term investment, it is crucial for industry, academia, and government to work together to create and support startups and venture companies, enhancing various forms of support tailored to each stage and characteristic, with the goal of forming a future venture ecosystem.

interaction_phrase: share information, interact, and collaborate
occurrence_sentence: To strengthen collaboration and work as one, it is expected that Q-STAR, an industry-led organization, and QIH, an organization centered on public research institutions and universities, will share information, interact, and collaborate more extensively than before.

interaction_phrase: establishing regular forums for systematic information sharing and exchange
occurrence_sentence: To this end, we will promote initiatives to strengthen the industry-academia-government collaboration framework. This includes establishing regular forums for systematic information sharing and exchange between Q-STAR and QIH, as well as building a new partnership framework (tentatively named Q-Partnership) that facilitates personnel exchanges and other collaborative activities.

interaction_phrase: building a new partnership framework
occurrence_sentence: To this end, we will promote initiatives to strengthen the industry-academia-government collaboration framework. This includes establishing regular forums for systematic information sharing and exchange between Q-STAR and QIH, as well as building a new partnership framework (tentatively named Q-Partnership) that facilitates personnel exchanges and other collaborative activities.

interaction_phrase: centered on public research institutions and universities
occurrence_sentence: To strengthen collaboration and work as one, it is expected that Q-STAR, an industry-led organization, and QIH, an organization centered on public research institutions and universities, will share information, interact, and collaborate more extensively than before.

interaction_phrase: centered on public research institutions and universities
occurrence_sentence: To strengthen collaboration and work as one, it is expected that Q-STAR, an industry-led organization, and QIH, an organization centered on public research institutions and universities, will share information, interact, and collaborate more extensively than before.

interaction_phrase: strategically pursuing standardization and intellectual property protection
occurrence_sentence: Given the anticipated massive future market for the quantum industry, strategically pursuing standardization and intellectual property protection is crucial for Japan to gain overseas markets and leverage quantum technology as a driver of economic growth, thereby enhancing international competitiveness.

interaction_phrase: work together to identify technologies requiring standardization
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, industry, academia, and government will work together to identify technologies requiring standardization for quantum devices (including materials and components) such as quantum computers, quantum sensors, and quantum communication equipment.

interaction_phrase: collaborate with existing standardization frameworks and stakeholders
occurrence_sentence: We will then collaborate with existing standardization frameworks and stakeholders to vigorously and strategically advance standardization efforts, strongly influencing the formation of market rules.

interaction_phrase: strategically pursuing intellectual property rights
occurrence_sentence: Quantum technology innovation hubs will also strengthen their efforts, such as actively and strategically pursuing intellectual property rights for quantum technologies, similar to other cutting-edge technologies, while referring to policies such as the "Intellectual Property Promotion Plan" 10.

interaction_phrase: collaborate to identify and secure critical devices and components
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, industry, academia, and government will collaborate to identify and secure critical devices and components that Japan must ensure.

interaction_phrase: establish a global development hub at AIST
occurrence_sentence: Aiming for Japan to become an international hub for the industrial application of quantum technology, particularly in Asia, we will establish a global development hub at AIST for the industrialization of quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: global enterprises and startups/ventures
occurrence_sentence: This initiative will involve not only European and American vendor companies but also global enterprises and startups/ventures, including user companies from Southeast Asia and other regions.

interaction_phrase: global enterprises and startups/ventures
occurrence_sentence: This initiative will involve not only European and American vendor companies but also global enterprises and startups/ventures, including user companies from Southeast Asia and other regions.

interaction_phrase: collaborate with domestic and international quantum computer vendors
occurrence_sentence: This will support the systemization of quantum computers and the development and evaluation of components and materials, thereby enhancing the international competitiveness of domestic companies.

interaction_phrase: integrating technologies in fields where Japanese industry holds strengths
occurrence_sentence: By integrating technologies in fields where Japanese industry holds strengths, such as chemistry and materials, with quantum technologies, this initiative will pioneer new approaches to leading-edge technologies in chemistry and materials, as well as new business and service frontiers, under industry-academia-government collaboration.
source_actor: Quantum Frontier Industry Creation Hub (Provisional Name)
